# JsonValues.IsInteger method

Returns `true` when *n* has no fractional part (it may still be outside the safe-integer range). Used to validate integer-typed fields. (R-2.5-a, R-2.5-b, AC-02.13)

```csharp
public static bool IsInteger(double n)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| n | The number to test. |

## Return Value

`true` when *n* is finite and whole.
